Class PretDAO

java.lang.Object
dao.ConnexionDAO
dao.controllers.PretDAO
public class PretDAO extends ConnexionDAO
This class is used to manage loans in the database. It provides methods to add, delete, update, and retrieve loans.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Loris

    Constructors

  • Constructor Details

    • PretDAO

      public PretDAO()
      Constructor for PretDAO. It initializes the connection to the database.

  • Method Details

    • add

      public int add(Date dateEmprunt, int dureeEmprunt, LocalDate dateRetourEffective, Livre livre, Usager usager)
      This method adds a new loan to the database.
      Parameters:
      dateEmprunt - the date of the loan
      dureeEmprunt - the duration of the loan in days
      dateRetourEffective - the effective return date, can be null if not yet returned
      livre - the book being loaned
      usager - the user borrowing the book
      Returns:
      the generated ID of the new loan

    • delete

      public int delete(Pret pret)
      This method deletes a loan from the database.
      Parameters:
      pret - the loan to be deleted
      Returns:
      the number of rows affected (should be 1 on success)

    • update

      public boolean update(Pret pret)
      This method updates an existing loan in the database.
      Parameters:
      pret - the loan to be updated
      Returns:
      true if the update was successful, false otherwise

    • get

      public Pret get(int id)
      This method retrieves a loan by its ID from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the loan to retrieve
      Returns:
      the loan object if found, null otherwise

    • getList

      public List<Pret> getList()
      This method retrieves a list of all loans from the database.
      Returns:
      a list of Pret objects representing all loans

    • getPretsParUsager

      public List<Object[]> getPretsParUsager(int id)
      This method retrieves a list of loans for a specific user by their ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the user
      Returns:
      a list of Object arrays containing loan details

    • getAverageEffectiveLoanDuration

      public double getAverageEffectiveLoanDuration()
      This method retrieves the average effective loan duration from the database.
      Returns:
      the average effective loan duration in days

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Main method for testing the PretDAO class. It demonstrates adding, updating, deleting, and retrieving loans.
